framework.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
framework.disclaimer: NIST AI RMF is public domain. Shown for reference — verify against the official NIST publication.

controls.title: Legal and Regulatory Requirements
controls.statement: Legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood, managed, and documented.

controls.title: Trustworthy AI Characteristics
controls.statement: The characteristics of trustworthy AI are integrated into organizational policies, processes, and procedures.

controls.title: Roles and Responsibilities
controls.statement: Roles, responsibilities, and lines of communication related to mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks are documented and clear.

controls.title: Context and Intended Purpose
controls.statement: Intended purpose, setting, and context of the AI system are understood and documented.

controls.title: Capabilities and Limitations
controls.statement: Scientific integrity and the system's capabilities, limitations, and assumptions are documented.

controls.title: Security and Resilience
controls.statement: AI system security and resilience are evaluated and documented, including against adversarial inputs.

controls.title: Harmful Bias
controls.statement: Fairness and bias are evaluated and results documented.

controls.title: Mechanisms to Sustain Value
controls.statement: Mechanisms are in place to sustain the value of deployed AI systems and to manage risk over time.

controls.title: Post-Deployment Monitoring
controls.statement: Post-deployment monitoring plans are implemented, including mechanisms for incident response and recovery.
